Full-Fleet Observability Command Wall

One command-wall view for the 47,979-agent department-gated runtime fleet, safety gates, circuit breakers, load tests, recovery drills, and Continual Harness status.

Open Runtime Fleet Open Full-Fleet Load Test Open Department-Gated Runtime Open Continual Harness Operator

1. Executive status banner

This wall observes and summarizes the control plane. It does not execute commands.

Full-fleet observability is not raw activate-all.

Overall system status: unknown
Recommended action: none

2. Fleet scale cards

Total registered agents: 47,979
Total departments: 1,777
Total units: 5,331
Total families: 175
Full fleet cap: 47,979

13. Export report panel

14. Safety boundary panel

Rollback status is observed only; no rollback execution occurs here.

The command wall can recommend review, pause, or recovery steps, but it does not perform destructive actions.

Command execution: disabled
Deploy execution: disabled
Rollback execution: disabled
Alert sending: disabled
Arbitrary shell execution: disabled
